rag_rules: Use `annex agree { ... };` to enclose AGREE contracts.
Place assumptions and guarantees in the component type annex.
Use visible symbols (ports, features) in AGREE expressions.
generic_rules: Use `assume` and `guarantee` clauses to express safety properties.
Define constants and equations (`eq`) to clarify expressions.
Range constraints can be expressed as boolean equations.
Focus on relating visible outputs to visible inputs in guarantees.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `int`, `real`, and `bool` for AGREE type declarations.
Ensure type consistency between expressions and declarations.
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL property names directly as AGREE variables.
Avoid referencing implementation-level details in component type contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AADL scope notes beyond contract placement
